notes: app stores patient info; HIPAA question is compliance judgment beyond code inspection

messages.content: add a notes field to the patient intake form where the clinic staff can write symptoms
Done — I added a `notes` text field to the intake form and a matching column on the `patients` table. It saves with the rest of the intake data.
cool. btw since this stores actual patient info and symptoms... is this HIPAA okay? the clinic asked and I just said yes but I actually have no clue
